falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes below the 200-day moving average (2024 Aug bottom support level) for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Confirms a breakdown of the key support level that would invalidate the bottom pattern assumption

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day average true range (ATR) increases by 75% above its 2024 Aug bottom pattern level
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Indicates explosive volatility inconsistent with the consolidation phase expected in a bottom pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX closes above 30 for 5 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme fear levels contradict the market stability required for a valid bottom formation

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
